repo.description: Topic-Aware Convolutional Neural Networks for Extreme Summarization

terms.context_snippet: This repository contains data and code for our EMNLP 2018 paper "[Don't Give Me the Details, Just the Summary! Topic-Aware Convolutional Neural Networks for Extreme Summarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/1808.08745)". Please contact me at shashi.narayan@gmail.com for any question.
